issues.title: Sitemap.xml Missing
issues.description: The sitemap.xml file returned a 404 error. This blocks search engines from efficiently crawling and indexing all pages. For a content-heavy site with a blog, this is critical.
fix_steps: Generate sitemap.xml (most static site generators like Astro have built-in sitemap plugins)
Add sitemap location to robots.txt: `Sitemap: https://growth4u.io/sitemap.xml`
Submit sitemap to Google Search Console

issues.title: Core Web Vitals Unknown
issues.description: Lighthouse was unavailable due to PSI rate limits. Without CWV data (LCP, CLS, FCP), we cannot assess page speed performance, which is a ranking factor and affects user experience.
fix_steps: Configure GOOGLE_API_KEY to enable PSI access
OR run Lighthouse locally: `npx lighthouse https://growth4u.io --view`
OR use WebPageTest.org for real-user performance metrics

issues.title: Missing LocalBusiness Schema
issues.description: Site has Organization, ProfessionalService, and FAQPage schemas, but no LocalBusiness schema. For a B2B service with area focus (Spain/Portugal), LocalBusiness schema can improve local search visibility.
fix_steps: Add LocalBusiness schema with address, phone, geo coordinates for Madrid office
Include opening hours, service area (Spain, Portugal, Iberia)

issues.title: TTFB Slightly Slow
issues.description: Time to First Byte (TTFB) is 159ms. While acceptable (<200ms), it could be optimized further. Page size is 75KB, which is lean.
fix_steps: Enable CDN caching (if not already using Cloudflare/Vercel edge)
Enable HTTP/2 server push for critical resources (already using HTTP/2)
Consider edge functions for dynamic content

issues.title: Low Internal Link Density
issues.description: Only 37 internal links found on homepage. For a site with 20+ blog articles, the homepage should link to more pillar content to distribute PageRank.
fix_steps: Add "Featured Articles" or "Popular Resources" section with 5-10 links
Link to key service pages from homepage content (not just nav)

score_calculation.note: Lighthouse unavailable. Score based solely on 15 health checks (13/15 passed = 86.67%)

errors: Google PSI rate limit exceeded — no Lighthouse data
